title: Class Metadata
description: Schema for class-level governance laws — laws shared by a family of patterns (e.g. all multi-step flows). A pattern opts in with pattern.extends; a pattern law can supersede a class law via refines (lex specialis).

$schema.description: Path to this JSON Schema for IDE validation and autocomplete.

class.description: Class family name, referenced by a pattern's `extends` (e.g. 'flow').

scope.description: Scope code that prefixes every law id in this file (e.g. 'FLOW').

description.description: What this family is and what its shared laws govern.

triggers.description: Base keywords that resolve these laws for any task of this family. The generator also unions in the keywords of every pattern that extends this class.

title.description: Short human sentence naming the law.

statement.description: The binding text of the law.

severity.description: How hard the law pushes back. A pattern may refine this to a stricter severity.

appliesWhen.description: The trigger / jurisdiction. Common keys: patternClass, scope, step.
